title: Dune
notes: Epic story about politics, religion, and ecology on a desert planet. Explores AI-free societies and human potential.

title: Project Hail Mary
notes: A lone astronaut solves a science mystery to save Earth. Hopeful, funny, full of problem-solving and friendship.

title: The Hobbit
notes: A cozy adventure about a hobbit who finds courage. Themes of home, bravery, and growth.

title: Klara and the Sun
notes: Told from the view of an AI companion robot. A gentle, emotional look at love, hope, and what it means to be human.
A dark political novel about surveillance, control, propaganda, and resistance under a totalitarian regime.

title: Brave New World
notes: A futuristic society built on comfort, consumption, conditioning, and the loss of individuality.

title: The Left Hand of Darkness
notes: A thoughtful science fiction novel exploring gender, diplomacy, identity, and trust on an alien world.

title: The Dispossessed
notes: A philosophical story about anarchism, capitalism, freedom, science, and the cost of building a better society.

title: Neuromancer
notes: A cyberpunk classic about hackers, artificial intelligence, virtual worlds, and corporate power.

title: Snow Crash
notes: A fast, wild cyberpunk novel about the metaverse, language, viruses, corporations, and information warfare.

title: Foundation
notes: A grand story of psychohistory, civilization, decline, and long-term planning across a galactic empire.

title: I, Robot
notes: A collection of robot stories exploring logic, ethics, artificial intelligence, and the famous Three Laws of Robotics.

title: The Martian
notes: A stranded astronaut survives on Mars using engineering, science, humor, and relentless problem-solving.

title: Hyperion
notes: A layered science fiction epic with pilgrims, mystery, time, religion, and unforgettable worldbuilding.

title: Ender's Game
notes: A young genius is trained for war in a story about strategy, empathy, leadership, and moral responsibility.

title: The Three-Body Problem
notes: A hard science fiction novel about first contact, physics, civilization, and humanity's place in the universe.

title: Children of Time
notes: A sweeping story of evolution, survival, intelligence, and the rise of a very different civilization.

title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?
notes: A philosophical sci-fi novel about androids, empathy, identity, and what separates humans from machines.

title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy
notes: A funny cosmic adventure full of absurdity, satire, aliens, and the meaning of life.

title: The Time Machine
notes: A foundational time travel story about class, evolution, the future, and the destiny of humanity.

title: The War of the Worlds
notes: A classic alien invasion story exploring fear, imperialism, survival, and humanity's vulnerability.

title: Fahrenheit 451
notes: A powerful novel about censorship, books, mass media, and the importance of independent thought.

title: The Road
notes: A bleak but moving story of a parent and child traveling through a devastated world.

title: Station Eleven
notes: A literary post-apocalyptic novel about art, memory, survival, and what remains after civilization collapses.

title: The Name of the Wind
notes: A beautifully written fantasy about music, magic, storytelling, ambition, and the making of a legend.

title: The Way of Kings
notes: A massive epic fantasy about honor, war, broken people, ancient powers, and personal growth.

title: Mistborn: The Final Empire
notes: A heist-style fantasy about rebellion, metal-based magic, oppression, and hope against impossible odds.

title: A Game of Thrones
notes: A political fantasy full of noble houses, betrayal, power struggles, family, and war.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
notes: The beginning of a legendary quest about friendship, courage, sacrifice, and resisting evil.

title: The Two Towers
notes: The middle part of the epic journey, following divided companions through war, danger, and loyalty.

title: The Return of the King
notes: The conclusion of the epic quest, filled with sacrifice, triumph, loss, and healing.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
notes: A magical school adventure about friendship, discovery, courage, and finding a place to belong.

title: The Lion, the Witch and the Wardrobe
notes: A classic portal fantasy about children entering Narnia and discovering courage, sacrifice, and wonder.

title: American Gods
notes: A mythic road novel about old gods, new gods, belief, identity, and modern America.

title: Good Omens
notes: A funny apocalyptic fantasy about an angel, a demon, friendship, fate, and saving the world.

title: The Color of Magic
notes: The first Discworld novel, full of comic fantasy, parody, strange magic, and clever absurdity.

title: The Priory of the Orange Tree
notes: A standalone epic fantasy with dragons, queens, ancient threats, politics, and powerful women.

title: Jonathan Strange & Mr Norrell
notes: A rich historical fantasy about English magic, scholarship, rivalry, and the return of old powers.

title: Piranesi
notes: A mysterious, beautiful novel about memory, solitude, wonder, and a house that seems endless.

title: The Lies of Locke Lamora
notes: A witty fantasy heist story about thieves, friendship, schemes, revenge, and a dangerous city.

title: Pride and Prejudice
notes: A sharp romantic classic about manners, pride, class, first impressions, and personal growth.

title: Jane Eyre
notes: A gothic coming-of-age novel about independence, morality, love, hardship, and self-respect.

title: Wuthering Heights
notes: A dark and passionate classic about obsession, revenge, family, class, and destructive love.

title: Great Expectations
notes: A classic story of ambition, guilt, social class, love, and moral development.

title: A Tale of Two Cities
notes: A historical classic set during the French Revolution, focused on sacrifice, justice, and redemption.

title: Moby-Dick
notes: A dense seafaring classic about obsession, nature, fate, revenge, and the hunt for a white whale.

title: The Great Gatsby
notes: A short American classic about wealth, illusion, love, ambition, and the emptiness of the American Dream.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
notes: A powerful novel about childhood, justice, racism, empathy, and moral courage.

title: The Catcher in the Rye
notes: A coming-of-age novel about alienation, grief, identity, and teenage confusion.

title: One Hundred Years of Solitude
notes: A landmark magical realist novel about family, memory, history, solitude, and cycles of time.

title: The Alchemist
notes: A simple spiritual story about dreams, destiny, signs, courage, and following a personal legend.

title: Siddhartha
notes: A spiritual novel about self-discovery, wisdom, desire, suffering, and inner peace.

title: The Stranger
notes: An existential novel about absurdity, detachment, society, justice, and meaning.

title: Crime and Punishment
notes: A psychological classic about guilt, morality, poverty, pride, punishment, and redemption.

title: The Brothers Karamazov
notes: A philosophical family drama about faith, doubt, free will, morality, and responsibility.

title: Anna Karenina
notes: A sweeping classic about love, family, society, desire, duty, and tragedy.

title: War and Peace
notes: A monumental novel about history, war, family, politics, love, and the movement of nations.

title: The Old Man and the Sea
notes: A short, symbolic story about endurance, pride, struggle, nature, and dignity.

title: The Sun Also Rises
notes: A modernist novel about disillusionment, travel, love, masculinity, and the Lost Generation.

title: Beloved
notes: A haunting novel about slavery, memory, trauma, motherhood, identity, and survival.

title: The Bluest Eye
notes: A painful and powerful novel about beauty standards, racism, childhood, and internalized harm.

title: Things Fall Apart
notes: A major African novel about tradition, masculinity, colonialism, change, and cultural conflict.

title: The Kite Runner
notes: A moving story about friendship, betrayal, guilt, redemption, family, and Afghanistan's history.

title: A Thousand Splendid Suns
notes: A heartbreaking and hopeful story about women, friendship, suffering, resilience, and love.

title: The Book Thief
notes: A World War II novel narrated by Death, centered on books, kindness, fear, and human courage.

title: All the Light We Cannot See
notes: A beautifully written World War II novel about a blind girl, a young soldier, radio, and survival.

title: The Nightingale
notes: A wartime story about sisters, resistance, sacrifice, family, and courage under occupation.

title: The Song of Achilles
notes: A lyrical retelling of Achilles and Patroclus, focused on love, fate, war, and loss.

title: Circe
notes: A mythological retelling about power, isolation, transformation, motherhood, and self-discovery.

title: Hamnet
notes: A literary historical novel about grief, family, Shakespeare's household, and the loss of a child.

title: The Silent Patient
notes: A psychological thriller about a silent woman, a determined therapist, secrets, obsession, and a twist.

title: Gone Girl
notes: A dark psychological thriller about marriage, media, manipulation, lies, and unreliable narration.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
notes: A crime mystery involving family secrets, journalism, hacking, corruption, and justice.

title: The Da Vinci Code
notes: A fast-paced mystery thriller about symbols, art, secret societies, history, and hidden clues.

title: And Then There Were None
notes: A classic mystery about strangers trapped on an island, secrets, guilt, and murder.

title: Murder on the Orient Express
notes: A famous detective mystery featuring Hercule Poirot, a train, a murder, and a clever solution.

title: The Hound of the Baskervilles
notes: A Sherlock Holmes mystery involving a family curse, a wild moor, fear, and rational investigation.

title: The Thursday Murder Club
notes: A cozy mystery about retirees solving crimes with humor, warmth, and surprising skill.

title: The Girl on the Train
notes: A psychological thriller about memory, obsession, unreliable narration, and a missing woman.

title: Shutter Island
notes: A suspenseful mystery set in a psychiatric hospital, exploring trauma, truth, and perception.

title: Atomic Habits
notes: A practical guide to building better habits through small improvements, systems, identity, and environment.

title: Deep Work
notes: A productivity book about focus, distraction, concentration, and creating meaningful high-value work.

title: Digital Minimalism
notes: A guide to using technology intentionally, reducing digital noise, and reclaiming attention.

title: The Psychology of Money
notes: A clear book about money behavior, risk, wealth, patience, luck, and long-term thinking.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
notes: A personal finance book about assets, liabilities, financial education, and mindset around money.

title: The Intelligent Investor
notes: A classic investing book about value investing, risk, margin of safety, and disciplined decision-making.

title: Zero to One
notes: A startup book about innovation, monopoly, technology, contrarian thinking, and building something new.

title: The Lean Startup
notes: A startup methodology book about experiments, MVPs, validated learning, iteration, and reducing waste.

title: Good to Great
notes: A business book about leadership, discipline, culture, focus, and building enduring companies.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
notes: A major psychology book about decision-making, bias, intuition, rationality, and human judgment.

title: Sapiens
notes: A broad history of humanity covering cognition, agriculture, empire, money, science, and modern society.

title: Homo Deus
notes: A speculative look at humanity's future, technology, data, immortality, intelligence, and meaning.

title: A Brief History of Time
notes: A famous science book explaining cosmology, black holes, time, space, and the universe.

title: The Selfish Gene
notes: An influential biology book about evolution, genes, natural selection, and the logic of survival.

title: The Gene
notes: A history of genetics covering heredity, DNA, medicine, identity, ethics, and scientific discovery.

title: Educated
notes: A memoir about growing up isolated, seeking education, family conflict, resilience, and self-invention.

title: Becoming
notes: A memoir about identity, family, public life, purpose, and personal growth.

title: Man's Search for Meaning
notes: A profound book about survival, suffering, meaning, responsibility, and psychological resilience.

title: The Diary of a Young Girl
notes: A powerful diary about adolescence, fear, hope, hiding, and life during the Holocaust.

title: Meditations
notes: A classic Stoic text about discipline, mortality, character, reason, and living with inner strength.
